title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM AE domain with MedDRA coding

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM AE (Adverse Events) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw adverse event data, (2) Derive USUBJID, AESEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map MedDRA coding hierarchy (AELLT → AEDECOD → AEHLT → AEHLGT → AEBODSYS), (4) Derive seriousness flags (AESER, AESCAN, AESCONG, AESDEATH, AESHOSP, AESLIFE, AESOD) from raw seriousness criteria, (5) Format AESTDTC and AEENDTC in ISO 8601, (6) Map AESEV, AEACN, AEREL, AEOUT per CDISC controlled terminology, (7) Handle supplemental qualifiers (SUPPAE) for variables that exceed SDTM model constraints, (8) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (9) Output as transport file. The study uses MedDRA v8.0 for adverse event coding.
